summary: LifeSync end-to-end test pass on iteration_1. Backend: 18/18 pytest tests passing — JWT register/login, AI endpoints REMOVED (404 confirmed), rule-based /api/stats/report weekly+monthly with required fields (summary/highlights/suggestion/metrics), dashboard summary+config, supplements CRUD with take/untake/adherence, water add/today/history. Frontend: /login renders all auth testIDs, Sign In with qa.tester@lifesync.app succeeds and redirects to dashboard. Dashboard quick-water buttons increment hydration. Supplements tab adds new supplement via sheet and marks taken. Water screen ring + add buttons work. Analytics tab shows rule-based 'Your Summary' card via stats-report-card with stats-period Weekly/Monthly toggle — NO AI generate button present (count=0). No deprecated Expo packages (expo-av/expo-barcode-scanner/expo-background-fetch) detected. Emerald accent rendering correctly on OLED black theme.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning observed: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' (likely from a third-party RN component / Sheet/Modal). Non-blocking but should be migrated in a future cleanup. Reference: detected via browser console on /login & dashboard.

action_items: Optional: replace any remaining `pointerEvents` prop usage with `style={{ pointerEvents: ... }}` in custom RN components to silence deprecation warning (non-blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1331 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth, supplements, water, stats, dashboard, analytics) for maintainability (>700 line guideline).
Generic Dict[str, Any] bodies on many CRUD endpoints accept arbitrary fields without validation; consider Pydantic models per resource for stricter input validation.
Code correctly excludes Mongo `_id`, uses env vars, async/await throughout, proper status codes, and bcrypt+JWT auth.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested flows (login, dashboard quick-water, supplements add+take, water screen, analytics weekly/monthly toggle, AI button absence)

seed_data_creation: Test created and self-cleaned a TEST_QA_Sup supplement and a 250ml water log; both deleted post-run. Used QA user qa.tester@lifesync.app.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env (https://health-sync-pro-4.preview.emergentagent.com). QA user qa.tester@lifesync.app / QaTest1234! works for login. The pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_lifesync_api.py covers auth, AI-removal, stats, dashboard, supplements CRUD and water flows — reuse it as regression. Frontend is served as static export via `serve` — refresh after backend code changes only.
